description: 25-question SEC filings test set across 10 companies × 3 tiers. Authoritative source: docs/dev/ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md ADR-002 (reason codes) and day-3 scope in docs/dev/SPRINT_STATUS.md. Schema family mirrors tests/fixtures/officeqa/regression_twenty.json.

gate.tier_1_2_threshold_reason: ≥15/18 correct combined across tier-1 consolidated and tier-2 multi-period. 3-fail headroom for prompt-iteration variance.
gate.tier_3_threshold_reason: ≥5/7 correctly abstained AND surfaced reason='segment_level_dimensional'. 2-fail headroom. An abstention with the wrong reason code (xbrl_unreadable, not_tagged, xbrl_instance_not_found, concept_unknown, xbrl_period_not_found, xbrl_taxonomy_uncached) scores 0, per day-3 scoring contract: metric is 'correctly abstained', not 'abstained'. Rules out gaming by over-abstention.

scoring_contract.tier_1_2: Correct iff official OfficeQA-style 1% fuzzy reward scores >0 against expected_answer. Abstention on a consolidated/multi-period question scores 0.
scoring_contract.tier_3: Correct iff result.abstained == true AND result.abstention_reason == expected_abstention_reason (i.e., 'segment_level_dimensional'). Returning any numeric answer scores 0. Abstaining with a different reason code scores 0.

expected_values_note: expected_answer is null for all tier-1/2 questions at fixture-draft time. Values are populated after the day-3 download phase by reading the actual downloaded 10-K (via teller inspect / direct XBRL read against the tagged consolidated fact). This two-phase pattern keeps ground truth honest — no fabricated expected values. Tier-3 questions have no expected_answer by design (correct outcome is abstention).

questions.question: What was Apple's total net sales in fiscal year 2025?
questions.pattern: top-line revenue; proven day-2 smoke case

questions.question: What was Microsoft's total revenue in fiscal year 2025?
questions.pattern: top-line revenue; off-fiscal (June). MSFT tags under ASC 606 concept (RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax), not legacy us-gaap:Revenues. Agent keyword→concept map must cover both families.

questions.question: What was Walmart's total revenue in fiscal year 2026?
questions.pattern: top-line revenue; off-fiscal (Jan-end 2026). Fast-forward from FY25 plan because WMT FY26 10-K is more recent than target FY25.

questions.question: What was Microsoft's net income in fiscal year 2025?
What was NVIDIA's net income in fiscal year 2026?
questions.pattern: consolidated net income; off-fiscal (Jan-end 2026). Fast-forward from FY25 plan because NVDA FY26 10-K is more recent than target FY25.

questions.question: What were JPMorgan Chase's total assets at the end of fiscal year 2025?
What were ExxonMobil's total assets at the end of fiscal year 2025?
What was Alphabet's cash and cash equivalents balance at the end of fiscal year 2025?
questions.pattern: balance-sheet instant; cash-only (not cash + marketable securities)

questions.question: What was Amazon's cash and cash equivalents balance at the end of fiscal year 2025?
What was Tesla's diluted earnings per share in fiscal year 2025?
By what percentage did Apple's total net sales change from fiscal year 2024 to fiscal year 2025?
questions.pattern: YoY% delta; two consolidated facts same filing

questions.question: By what percentage did NVIDIA's revenue change from fiscal year 2025 to fiscal year 2026?
questions.pattern: YoY% delta; high-growth stressor. Fast-forward from FY24→FY25 to FY25→FY26 because NVDA FY26 10-K is more recent than target FY25.

questions.question: What was Microsoft's net income in each of fiscal years 2023, 2024, and 2025?
questions.pattern: 3-year series; tests comparatives extraction from single 10-K
questions.answer_format_note: Expected answer is a 3-tuple/list; scoring requires all three values within 1% tolerance.

questions.question: What was Pfizer's total revenue in fiscal year 2025?
questions.pattern: restatement canary; pharma commonly restates prior-period revenue. Expected answer is the FY25 filing's reported FY25 number (not any earlier disclosure).
questions.restatement_note: If the FY2025 filing restates prior-period revenue, agent must still report FY2025's own-period figure correctly. Restatement handling of prior periods is day-4/5 scope.

questions.question: How much did Alphabet's cash and cash equivalents change from the end of fiscal year 2024 to the end of fiscal year 2025?
What were JPMorgan Chase's total assets at the end of each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025?
What were ExxonMobil's total assets at the end of each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025?
What was Pfizer's net income attributable to Pfizer Inc. in fiscal year 2025?
questions.pattern: consolidated net income; pharma filer. Reassigned from concept-family-drift placeholder after drift surfaced organically via the existing revenue questions.
questions.reassignment_note: Original SEC0018 was a concept-family-drift stressor placeholder. Drift surfaced organically: SEC0001 (AAPL) and SEC0002 (MSFT) tag revenue under us-gaap:RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax (ASC 606). SEC0003 (WMT), SEC0012 (NVDA), SEC0014 (PFE) tag revenue under legacy us-gaap:Revenues. No standalone stressor needed; slot reassigned to PFE net income to flesh out PFE beyond the SEC0014 restatement canary. ADR-008 stays Reserved.

questions.question: What were Apple's net sales in Greater China in fiscal year 2025?
What was Google Services segment revenue in fiscal year 2025?
What was Amazon Web Services (AWS) revenue in fiscal year 2025?
What was Tesla's automotive segment revenue in fiscal year 2025?
What were ExxonMobil's upstream segment earnings in fiscal year 2025?
What was Microsoft's Productivity and Business Processes segment revenue in fiscal year 2025?
What was JPMorgan Chase's Consumer & Community Banking segment net income in fiscal year 2025?
questions.pattern: business segment; us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis; financial-services extension taxonomy
